description: Composition Pink kurta made of a blended fabric, has a heavily embroidered yoke, mandarin collar with a V-neck, three-quarter sleeves with rounded slit cuffs hems and has embroidery and silver striped inner lining, with a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurta from aneri. The soft fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the heavily embroidered yoke heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with cream leggings and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
